title: Legal Information Services * LGBTQ2+ Issues - 211info
text: - Radius - 5 Miles 10 Miles 25 Miles 50 Miles 100 Miles Search by Provider Name > New Search > Legal & Public Safety > Legal Information Services * LGBTQ2+ Issues 2 Matching Service Providers Refine Results - Select - No Filter AIDS/HIV Issues LGBTQ2+ Issues Print & Share All Results X Print & Share Print PDF LAMBDA LEGAL LEGAL HELP DESK Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides information and resources regarding discrimination related to sexual orientation, gender identity and expression, and HIV status; inquiries are kept confidential. Assistance may include follow-up discussions with Lambda Legal attorneys or contact information for an attorney in the area or for other organizations that may directly assist. The Help Desk cannot provide legal advice. 120 Wall Street 19th Floor New York, NY 100053919 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Not applicable Email (213) 382-7600 Get Directions Visit Website More Details NATIONAL CENTER FOR LGBTQ RIGHTS LEGAL INFORMATION LINE Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides assistance on civil and human rights issues affecting LGBTQ2+ individuals, including public policy advocacy, impact litigation, legal help, and education on legal rights. Specific online forms for custody disputes, separation or divorce, immigration or asylum, and other issues. 870 Market Street Suite 370 San Francisco, CA 94102 Eligibility: LGBTQ2+ individuals and their families Hours: Monday-Friday 9am-5pm Email (800) 528-6257 - Get Directions Visit Website More Details No Mapping Information Available
